what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for a single design-source image asset (vt-residential/p-2.jpg), stored as Markdown with YAML frontmatter.
observations: YAML frontmatter declares id, address, channel, path, blob reference, mime type, name, and timestamps
The image is recorded as image/jpeg with width 0 and height 0
source is set to design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
Body text states 'SOURCE design ground-truth — vt-residential/p-2.jpg'
standouts: Recorded image dimensions are 0x0 despite being an image/jpeg entry
No links or downstream references are present
Explicitly labeled as design ground-truth source material
concerns: Width and height are zero, suggesting dimensions were not extracted or are placeholder values
No descriptive caption, alt text, or content summary for the image
Empty links array leaves the asset isolated in the ledger
notes: A sparse but addressable ledger card for a design-source JPEG, useful mainly for provenance and blob lookup once dimensions and links are populated.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What visual content does vt-residential/p-2.jpg contain?
How is this asset intended to be referenced or consumed by other files?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is a design ground-truth source image ledger entry; the file matches that purpose as a metadata record, though it lacks extracted dimensions and relationships.
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to register a specific design-source image in a persistent, queryable ledger so it can be located by id, path, or blob reference.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable metadata record for a design-source image, including a blob reference and authoring session, which a fused system can use to locate and attribute the underlying asset.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata record for the JPEG image vt-residential/p-2 in the design-source channel, referencing blob b2:841139800f211d3572e333f1d09a9347 with zero recorded dimensions and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and make addressable a source design image for downstream reference, provenance, or fusion.
